channel.title: BriefBeakon Daily
channel.description: Your AI-curated daily news briefing. Every morning, a fresh 10-15 minute audio digest of the most important stories in AI, technology, business, sports, jobs, and entertainment.
channel.itunes:author: BriefBeakon AI
channel.itunes:summary: A 10-15 minute daily audio briefing covering AI, technology, business, sports, jobs, and entertainment. New episodes generated every morning.

item.title: BriefBeakon Daily - 2026-06-18
item.description:
[Introduction] Welcome to BriefBeakon Daily. Today is Thursday, June 18, 2026.
[AI News] Self-Driving Taxis Go Mainstream: Autonomous Fleet Launches in 12 Major Cities.
[Technology News] TSMC Begins Mass Production of 1nm Chips, Ushering in New Era of Computing.
[Business News] Global Markets Rally as Inflation Drops to 2% Target for First Time in Years.
[Closing] Thats all for todays edition of BriefBeakon Daily. Stay informed, and well see you tomorrow.

item.title: BriefBeakon Daily - 2026-06-17
item.description:
[Introduction] Welcome to BriefBeakon Daily. Today is Wednesday, June 17, 2026.
[AI News] OpenAI Unveils GPT-5 with Breakthrough Reasoning Capabilities.
[Technology News] Apple Vision Pro 2 Ships With Half the Weight and Double the Battery Life.
[Closing] Thats all for todays edition of BriefBeakon Daily.

item.title: BriefBeakon Daily - 2026-06-16
item.description:
[Introduction] Welcome to BriefBeakon Daily. Today is Tuesday, June 16, 2026.
[AI News] DeepMinds New AI Solves Decade-Old Biology Problem.
[Business News] Nvidia Becomes First Trillion-Dollar Chip Company.
[Closing] Thats all for todays edition of BriefBeakon Daily.
